sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Waste Management (WM) Set to Report Q1 Earnings on April 28
feed.summary: Waste Management Inc. (WM) is scheduled to release its Q1 earnings on April 28, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.74, a 4.2% year-over-year increase. The company holds a strong GF Score of 92/100, indicating robust long-term return potential due to high profitability and growth. However, insider selling and a moderate financial strength rating suggest caution for investors.

feed.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Positioned for Long-Term Growth as Power Demand from Data Centers Surges
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) is expected to benefit significantly from the surging power demands of data centers. The company's Power & Energy segment, which provides on-site power solutions, saw a substantial revenue increase and contributes to a growing order backlog. This trend is forecasted to continue as data center electricity demand is projected to rise by 200% by 2035, securing long-term service and maintenance revenue for Caterpillar.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) Files Form 8-K with SEC
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) has filed a Form 8-K with the SEC on April 23, 2026, to provide essential updates and disclosures to investors and stakeholders. These filings typically contain information on financial performance, changes in corporate governance, or other significant corporate events, which are crucial for informed investment decisions in the pharmaceutical industry. GuruFocus.com offers further detailed information and analysis on Pfizer Inc. and its SEC filings.

feed.title: Organic social beats paid 13x on engagement as Hershey’s rewired, marketing intelligence stack exposes hidden performance; shift to real-time decisioning is US breakthrough for Mutinex
feed.summary: The Hershey Company is transforming its marketing strategy by moving from campaign optimization to a real-time, data-driven system with the help of Mutinex's Market Mix Modelling (MMM). This shift aims to improve decision-making speed and efficiency amidst growing channel complexity and consumer overload. Early insights reveal that organic social content can achieve significantly higher engagement than paid media, influencing how Hershey invests its marketing resources.

feed.title: IT Investor Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit -
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner management inflated growth projections for its Contract Value metric, which was a primary indicator for investors to gauge future revenue. The firm claims that despite management's assurances of acceleration, actual CV growth consistently declined, leading to significant investor losses.

feed.title: Teradyne (TER) Valuation In Focus As Earnings Momentum And Estimate Upgrades Draw Investor Attention
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) is heading into its earnings report with strong market expectations of 77.1% year-on-year revenue growth and significant recent share price momentum. While the stock trades above the average analyst price target, Simply Wall St's narrative suggests Teradyne is overvalued at $401.98 compared to a fair value estimate of $307.41, raising questions about whether the momentum aligns with underlying fundamentals. Key risks include weaker robotics demand and trade policy uncertainty.

feed.title: Should Upgraded Earnings Estimates Ahead of May 1 Report Require Action From Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Investors?
feed.summary: Analysts have recently upgraded earnings estimates for Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) ahead of its May 1, 2026 quarterly report, indicating higher expected revenue and profit. This positive shift is driven by growing confidence in Cboe's near-term earnings potential, reinforced by developments like the launch of the Cboe IBIT Volatility Index. However, investors are cautioned to consider the central risk of Cboe's reliance on its S&P index options franchise and to weigh various fair value estimates.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Orders Icon Class 6 and 7
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has confirmed an order for a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship from Meyer Turku, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030. This expands their long-term agreement with the shipyard, securing shipbuilding capacity until 2036. The collaboration highlights a three-decade partnership that has seen Meyer Turku build 25 ships for Royal Caribbean, contributing significantly to Finland's economy.

feed.title: North American Construction Group Sets May 14 Conference Call on First-Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: North American Construction Group (NACG) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 13, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call and webcast on May 14, 2026. This event will allow investors and analysts to review the company's performance and outlook. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates NOA as Neutral due to weakening fundamentals, although it notes positive aspects like reiterated 2026 guidance and a reasonable P/E.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Raises MPLX Target to $63, Cites Strong Sector Momentum
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for MPLX LP to $63 from $55, reiterating a Buy rating due to strong sector performance driven by a shift to energy stocks and Middle East tensions. Barclays also increased its price target to $59, maintaining an Overweight rating. MPLX LP is a master limited partnership focusing on midstream energy infrastructure, specifically in crude oil, natural gas, and related product logistics.

feed.title: Anbio Biotechnology Calls May 15 Shareholder Votes on Sweeping Capital and Governance Overhaul
feed.summary: Anbio Biotechnology (NNNN) is holding shareholder meetings on May 15, 2026, to approve significant changes to its capital and governance structure. These proposed changes include a reduction in par value, a substantial increase in authorized share capital to introduce new Class C and preference shares, and a tenfold increase in voting power for Class B shares. The company also seeks authority for reverse share consolidations and stricter governance rules, all aimed at consolidating board and insider control while providing flexibility for future financing.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Trent Thad Sells 60,000 Shares of ON Semiconductor Corp (ON)
feed.summary: Trent Thad, EVP & CFO of ON Semiconductor Corp's subsidiary, sold 60,000 shares of the company on April 24, 2026. This sale is part of a trend where Thad has sold 170,000 shares over the past year with no purchases. The stock is currently trading at $96.5, with a market cap of $38.561 billion, and is considered significantly overvalued based on its GF Value of $58.38.

feed.title: Primis Financial Corp Operating Profits Surge 126 Percent in First Quarter
feed.summary: Primis Financial Corp (NASDAQ:FRST) reported a first-quarter net income of $7.3 million, or $0.30 per share, for 2026, a decrease from the previous year due to one-time gains in 2025. Despite this, the company's operating profits surged by 126% year-over-year, reaching $0.33 per share on an operating basis. Primis saw significant improvement in its net interest income and margin, balance sheet growth, and expanding mortgage warehouse business, and remains on track to meet its 2026 profitability targets.

feed.title: Fifth Third’s Bill Adams joins Auto Finance Summit East 2026
feed.summary: Bill Adams, chief U.S. economist at Fifth Third Bank, will deliver a macroeconomic and automotive industry outlook at Auto Finance Summit East 2026. His presentation will cover interest rate cycles, GDP growth, SAAR forecasts, pricing dynamics, and economic headwinds facing auto finance. The summit aims to bring together industry leaders to discuss trends and technological advancements in auto finance.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) CFO Trent Thad Sells 30,000 Shares
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) CFO Trent Thad sold 30,000 shares of the company's stock on April 23rd at an average price of $93, totaling $2.79 million. Following this sale, which was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, Thad now owns 301,194 shares. The article notes the company's collaboration with NIO on 900V EV platforms and tailwinds from industrial/automotive chips, but also highlights a recent revenue decrease, thin margins, and a high trailing P/E ratio, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP CONFIRMS ORDER WITH MEYER TURKU FOR ICON 6 AND 7
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has confirmed an order with Meyer Turku for a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030, respectively. This order is part of a long-term agreement with Meyer Turku, securing shipbuilding capacity through 2036 and further extending the economic impact to Finland. The collaboration highlights a continued commitment to innovation in cruise ship design, expanding Royal Caribbean's Icon Class fleet which includes Icon of the Seas and Star of the Seas already delivered, and Legend of the Seas and Hero of the Seas upcoming.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean locks in two more Icon ships, stretching builds to 2030
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) has confirmed orders with Meyer Turku for two additional Icon Class ships, Icon 6 and Icon 7, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030, respectively. This extends their shipbuilding framework through 2036, following the previously announced Icon 5 for 2028. The Icon 7 order is contingent on customary conditions, including financing, but reinforces the company's strategy for large, next-generation vessels and continued investment in the Finnish maritime industry.

feed.title: [PUBLISH BETWEEN: 4/24 - 5/7] Make Mother's Day Sweeter With These 9 Hershey's Chocolate Gifts
feed.summary: This article suggests nine Hershey's chocolate gifts to make Mother's Day special. Options range from personalized chocolate bars and a mixed bag of candies to an enormous Hershey's Kiss and chocolate-covered nuts or caramels. The piece emphasizes that chocolate offers a sweet treat and a moment of rest for busy moms.

feed.title: Researchers found a brain metastasis weakness — MediciNova plans clinical work
feed.summary: MediciNova (NASDAQ: MNOV) announced a new peer-reviewed study in Cancer Research revealing a vulnerability in brain metastasis involving the MIF–CD74 pathway, which can be inhibited by their drug candidate ibudilast (MN-166). The study, conducted by the Spanish National Cancer Research Centre (CNIO), found that ibudilast reduced metastatic progression in preclinical models and identified a potential liquid biopsy biomarker in cerebrospinal fluid. MediciNova plans to collaborate with CNIO on advancing these findings into clinical research for patients with solid tumors and brain metastases.

feed.title: New Peer‑Reviewed Study Reveals Actionable
feed.summary: A new peer-reviewed study, published in "Cancer Research," identifies the macrophage migration inhibitory factor (MIF)–mediated reprogramming of CD74‑positive microglia and macrophages as a critical vulnerability in brain metastasis. The study demonstrates that ibudilast (MN-166), MediciNova's lead asset, can effectively block this signaling pathway, reverse pro-metastatic immune reprogramming, and suppress brain metastasis growth in preclinical models, suggesting a new therapeutic avenue for neuro-oncology. MediciNova plans to pursue biomarker-driven clinical strategies and collaborate on further research for patients with solid tumors having brain metastases.

feed.title: LSB Industries Grants Retention RSUs to CEO Behrman
feed.summary: LSB Industries (LXU) granted CEO Mark Behrman 706,880 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 24, 2026, as a one-time retention incentive. These RSUs vest in 2029, with provisions for accelerated vesting under specific conditions, aiming to align Behrman's interests with shareholders and ensure his continued leadership. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates LXU as Neutral, citing improving fundamentals balanced against cyclicality and current valuation.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Marks America’s 250th Anniversary with ‘Independence One’ – A Tribute to U.S. History and Patriotism
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is celebrating America's 250th anniversary by introducing "Independence One," a new aircraft livery designed in patriotic red, white, and blue, featuring symbols like 13 stars and the phrase "life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness." This aircraft joins "Freedom One" and "Liberty One" in honoring the nation's history and values. Additionally, Southwest has partnered with America250 as the official airline of "America Gives," pledging up to $250,000 to support volunteerism.

feed.title: DRVN 11-DAY DEADLINE ALERT: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action Alleging Pervasive Accounting Errors and Internal Control Failures - Hagens Berman
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has issued an alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN). The lawsuit follows the company's admission of inability to file required financial reports and a Nasdaq non-compliance notice, stemming from alleged pervasive accounting errors and internal control failures. Investors who have suffered substantial losses are encouraged to submit their information before the May 8, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) director Mortimer Buckley granted 7,686 phantom stock units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. director Mortimer J. Buckley was granted 7,686.539 phantom stock units as deferred compensation, increasing his total phantom units to 24,391.124. These units, valued at $26.67 each, are part of the company's Nonfunded Deferred Compensation and Unit Award Plan for Non-Employee Directors and will be settled in cash or common stock upon his retirement. This transaction is considered a moderate impact with a neutral sentiment, reflecting a compensation award rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: AT&T (T) – Among the 10 Best Fortune 500 Dividend Stocks to Invest in Right Now
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is highlighted as one of the top Fortune 500 dividend stocks to invest in, boasting a 4.24% annual dividend yield. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q1 2026 results, exceeding earnings and revenue estimates and adding more wireless subscribers by bundling services. Despite a slight price target reduction by Scotiabank, the firm maintains a 'Sector Perform' rating, citing strong execution and achievable decommissioning goals, with an outlook for significant free cash flow for the remainder of 2026.

feed.title: Is Pfizer (PFE) One of the Best Fortune 500 Dividend Stocks to Invest in Right Now?
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) is highlighted as one of the best Fortune 500 dividend stocks, boasting an annual dividend yield of 6.37%. The company recently declared its 350th consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.43 per share and aims for full-year revenue between $59.5 billion and $62.5 billion for 2026. While acknowledging Pfizer's investment potential, the article suggests that some AI stocks might offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Chipotle hires Fernando Machado as chief brand officer
feed.summary: Chipotle has announced the hiring of Fernando Machado as its new chief brand officer, effective June. This strategic move highlights Chipotle's increased focus on brand-building to support its growth strategy and global expansion plans. Machado, an experienced marketer in the CPG and restaurant sectors, is expected to drive significant brand initiatives for the company.

feed.title: Huawei Named a Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Second Year in a Row
feed.summary: Huawei has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for the second consecutive year. This honor is based on a 100% willingness-to-recommend rating for its OceanProtect Data Protection product from 241 reviews and an overall rating of 4.9 out of 5.0, reflecting global customer trust in its comprehensive competitiveness and service quality. Song Ke, President of Huawei Data Protection Domain, emphasized the company's commitment to continued product innovation and customer-centric end-to-end data protection solutions.

feed.title: Kforce Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Kforce Inc. announced Q1 2026 revenues of $330.4 million, marking its first year-over-year growth since Q4 2022, with EPS of $0.46 exceeding expectations. The company projects mid-single-digit revenue growth for Q2, driven by increased demand for flexible workforce solutions and AI-related projects. Kforce is expanding its India Development Center and establishing AI Innovation Studio/AI pods, while strong execution in pricing and service delivery has led to higher gross margins and operating leverage.

feed.title: Avery Dennison takes $75 million stake in Wiliot
feed.summary: Avery Dennison has made a $75 million minority investment in Wiliot, a provider of passive Bluetooth low-energy (BLE) sensors for supply chain inventory visibility. This investment builds on prior collaborations related to Walmart's use of RFID and ambient IoT sensors. The partnership aims to expand the adoption of digital identities on physical items, combining RFID and BLE technologies to provide broader solutions for visibility and condition monitoring across industries like retail, logistics, and food.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt (NASDAQ: JBHT) director gets 1,359-share stock award

This transaction increases his direct holdings to 42,257 shares, with an additional 75,431 shares held indirectly through a grantor retained annuity trust. The filing also noted a transfer of 38,304 shares from the trust to Robo in March 2026.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) director receives phantom stock compensation award
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. director James C. Smith was granted 7,686.539 Phantom Stock Units as deferred compensation, valued at $26.67 per unit. These units, which track Pfizer's common stock, are part of the company's Nonfunded Deferred Compensation and Unit Award Plan for Non-Employee Directors. After this transaction, Smith holds a total of 178,111.302 Phantom Stock Units, to be settled in cash or stock upon his retirement from the board.

feed.title: Former Target Legal Chief’s Severance Package Exceeds $5 Million
feed.summary: Target Corp.'s former legal chief, Amy Tu, received $5.8 million in compensation in the year she was fired. This includes a nearly $1 million initial severance payment, with a total severance package valued at $5.3 million to be paid over two years. Tu's 2025 compensation also encompassed a pro-rated base salary and $4.5 million in stock awards.

feed.title: APO 4-DAY DEADLINE ALERT: Hagens Berman Alerts Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors to Securities Class Action Stemming From "Epstein Files" Revelations
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has alerted investors of Apollo Global Management (APO) to a securities class action lawsuit following "Epstein Files" revelations. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo and its executives made false statements regarding the firm's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, causing a significant drop in Apollo's stock price. Investors who suffered losses between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm by May 1, 2026, to discuss lead plaintiff opportunities.
